channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nicola Sturgeon speaks out following Peter Murrell's embezzlement confession
item.description: Nicola Sturgeon gave her first broadcast interview since her former husband, Peter Murrell, admitted to embezzling over £400,000 from donations made to the Scottish National Party (SNP). In the interv...

item.title: Government to release second set of documents on Mandelson’s US ambassador appointment
item.description: The UK government is expected to publish a second and potentially extensive batch of documents concerning the appointment of Lord Peter Mandelson as the UK’s ambassador to the United States. According...

item.title: Gor Mahia bag prize money for league win; comparison with East African champions
item.description: Gor Mahia clinched the 2025/2026 Kenya Premier League title, finishing the season with 69 points and securing a 22nd league crown. The club secured the championship ahead of AFC Leopards, with their r...

item.title: Temporary free public transport scheme in Victoria concludes, regular fares resume
item.description: Free public transport for commuters in Victoria has officially come to an end, with the measure concluding from today, 1 June 2026. The temporary initiative, which had allowed passengers to travel wit...

item.title: Webinar in Vijayawada focuses on hydrocarbon exploration and energy security for India
item.description: A webinar titled ‘Untapped Hydrocarbon Frontiers – A Forward-Looking Perspective for India’ was conducted on Saturday in Vijayawada, bringing together experts, students, and professionals to discuss k...

item.title: Paul Krugman warns about U.S. political instability and inequality in post-Trump era
item.description: A Nobel Prize-winning economist, Paul Krugman, has issued a warning about the long-term political and economic consequences of the movement associated with former President Donald Trump. In comments s...

item.title: DOJ, BOC, NBI strengthen coordination vs smuggling syndicates
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ), Bureau of Customs (BOC), and National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) are stepping up their coordination efforts to go after smuggling bosses and organized syndicates op...

item.title: Tinubu Approves 1,000 Forest Guards and Rescue Unit to Protect Oyo Communities
item.description: Following the tragic abduction of pupils and teachers from three schools in Oriire Local Government Area, Oyo State on May 15, 2026, President Bola Tinubu don approve urgent security measures to safeg...

item.title: Trump suggests replacing withdrawn Freedom 250 performers with his own rally speech in Washington
item.description: US President Donald Trump has said he may personally take part in the Freedom 250 celebration after several scheduled performers withdrew from the event. The festival, which is part of the Great Ameri...

item.title: Kostyuk stuns Swiatek as French Open sees major upsets; Zverev advances to quarter-finals
item.description: The French Open continued to deliver surprising results on Sunday as Marta Kostyuk produced a major upset by defeating former champion Iga Swiatek in the fourth round. Swiatek, who was celebrating her...

item.title: Tanzania Mourns Passing of Leonard Mususa, Former MCL Chairman
item.description: Leonard Mususa, the former chairman of Mtwara Corridor Limited (MCL), has passed away, leaving a big gap in Tanzania's infrastructure and business sector. His family and close associates confirmed the...

item.title: Canada narrows down finalists in major submarine procurement as decision approaches
item.description: The competition to supply Canada’s next generation of submarines has reached its final phase, with the federal government evaluating two competing bids for a major defence contract. South Korea’s Hanw...

item.title: CAAP reminds public: Laser pointing at aircraft poses serious flight safety risks and is punishable by law
item.description: The Civil Aviation Authority of the Philippines (CAAP) has issued a strong reminder to the public against pointing laser beams or any high-intensity lights at aircraft, warning that such actions can s...

item.title: Springbok Women secure fifth consecutive Rugby Africa Women's Cup title after hard-fought win over Kenya
item.description: The Springbok Women secured their fifth consecutive Rugby Africa Women's Cup title with a 35-20 victory over Kenya in Nairobi on Sunday, but were pushed far harder than expected by the determined home...

item.title: Norway Claims First World Championship Medal with Overtime Win Over Canada
item.description: In a surprising turn at the World Men's Hockey Championship, Norway secured its first-ever medal by defeating Canada 3-2 in overtime. Noah Steen scored the decisive goal at 3:32 of the extra session, ...

item.title: ABC revives Race Around the World with Zan Rowe as host
item.description: ABC is bringing back its iconic series Race Around the World, more than 25 years after its original run. The show, which originally aired in 1997, sent aspiring filmmakers around the globe with minima...

item.title: Liverpool prioritise Andoni Iraola in search for new manager after Arne Slot dismissal
item.description: Liverpool are preparing to begin formal discussions with Andoni Iraola as they accelerate their search for a new head coach following the dismissal of Arne Slot. The club’s hierarchy has identified th...

item.title: NFP tribunal confirms expulsion of KZN MEC Mbali Shinga after disciplinary proceedings
item.description: The National Freedom Party (NFP) has finalised its internal disciplinary process regarding KwaZulu-Natal Social Development MEC Mbali Shinga. The party's appeals tribunal has dismissed Shinga’s appeal...

item.title: Former President Obasanjo Share How Him Dey Manage Diabetes for Over 40 Years with Healthy Lifestyle
item.description: Former President Olusegun Obasanjo don open up about how him take manage diabetes for more than 40 years now. The man talk am during the launch of one big expedition wey dem call “Lagos to the World” ...

item.title: Osimhen among players with most UEFA Champions League Player of the Match awards in 2025/26 season
item.description: Galatasaray striker Victor Osimhen has ended the 2025/26 UEFA Champions League season as one of the standout performers after finishing among the players with the highest number of Player of the Match...
